Tip of the day
Quality outcome will help raise the chances for better quality items seen at the bottom of recipes in the crafting interface.

Spectral handwear

Spectral handwear
(Eternal)
Quality:
Type: Crafted
Slot: Hands
Value: 507
Keyword: Spectral
Search
Keyword: 		Artisan
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

The ectoplasm weave of these gloves keeps your fingers protected while you toil on artisan works.

The Spectral handwear item is a crafted item.

Requirement

  • Have 55% towards maximum Artisan level [323].

Attributes

Quality Attributes

Global -25% Work efficiency
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +2 Quality outcome
While doing Artisan skills.
Global +5% Chance to find 1 Ectoplasm
While in Ghostly location.
While doing Artisan skills.

While doing Artisan skills.

While doing Artisan skills.

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Primary Recipe Output

Make spectral handwear

You take a few bones and weave them into some ectoplasm that you shape for protection while keeping the dynamic movement around your fingers for artisan tasks.

Craft some ghastly spectral handwear.

Recipe Outputs
Recipe Name Level Service
Requirement 		Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Make spectral handwear Tailoring lvl. 56 Needs Advanced Cursed Loom service or better. 2x Bones
10x Ectoplasm		 1x Spectral handwear
